name: cs427-exam-1-study
description: Static study site (no compile step). Scripts satisfy mistaken npm usage and print how to preview.

scripts.build:ch05: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const p='week_5_oo_patterns_part_1.html'; fs.accessSync(p); console.log('OK — no build output for this repo.'); console.log('Week 5:', p); console.log('Preview: python3 -m http.server 8080  →  http://localhost:8080/index.html');"
